rationale: The execution of 'reg.exe' via 'cmd.exe' from a batch file (A0) to set 'DefaultUserName' (EV-001) and 'DefaultPassword' (EV-002, EV-003) in the Winlogon registry indicates an attempt to establish autologon. While the 'DefaultPassword' was subsequently deleted by 'regedit.exe' (EV-004), the initial attempt to modify these critical registry keys is highly suspicious, even if reverted.
